values.fullName: Care plan needed if %3E 30 day stay
DLSP - advance directives and care plans
DLSP - immunization of persons in care
Flavoured products in an all-age store
How long records must be kept
Money and valuables of persons in care
Poor change room or washroom cleanliness
Release or removal of a PIC
Restraints recorded in a care plan
Sale of products that do not comply
Short term care plan on admission
Smoking on health care facility property
Smoking within 6m of doorway%2C window or air intake
Vaping on health care facility property
Chemical or physical water quality parameters in excess of acceptable concentrations
